options.content:
**Provider Workspace**  
[Summary](/d/patient-360-overview/patient-360-summary) | [Meds & Allergies](/d/patient-360-medications/patient-360-meds-and-allergies) | [Labs & Vitals](/d/patient-360-labs-vitals/patient-360-labs-and-vitals) | [Problems](/d/patient-360-problems/patient-360-problems) | [Timeline](/d/patient-360-timeline/patient-360-timeline)  
Paste a `golden_id` in the field above to load a patient-focused view.

targets.rawSql: select p.golden_id as "Golden ID", string_agg(distinct trim(concat_ws(' ', p.first_name, p.last_name)), ' | ' order by trim(concat_ws(' ', p.first_name, p.last_name))) as "Patient Name(s)", min(p.birth_date)::date as "Birth Date", max(date_part('year', age(p.birth_date)))::int as "Age", max(p.gender) as "Gender", string_agg(distinct p.zip_code, ', ' order by p.zip_code) as "ZIP Codes", string_agg(distinct p.source_system, ', ' order by p.source_system) as "Source Systems", count(distinct p.id) as "Linked Records", coalesce((select rr.readmission_risk from analytics.readmission_risk rr where rr.golden_id = p.golden_id limit 1), 'low') as "Readmission Risk", max(e.start_date)::date as "Last Visit Date" from patients p left join encounters e on e.patient_id = p.id where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}' group by p.golden_id;

select count(distinct coalesce(m.description, m.code)) as current_med_count from medications m join patients p on p.id = m.patient_id where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}' and coalesce(m.description, m.code) is not null and (coalesce(m.status, 'active') not in ('stopped', 'cancelled', 'entered-in-error') or m.stop_date is null or m.stop_date >= current_date);
select count(distinct a.id) from allergies a join patients p on p.id = a.patient_id where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}' and coalesce(a.clinical_status, 'active') = 'active';

select count(distinct cp.id) as active_plan_count from care_plans cp join patients p on p.id = cp.patient_id where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}' and coalesce(cp.status, '') not in ('revoked', 'completed');

with alerts as (with active_meds as (
    select distinct
        lower(nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '')) as med_name,
        nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '') as display_name
    from medications m
    join patients p on p.id = m.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '') is not null
      and (
        coalesce(m.status, 'active') not in ('stopped', 'cancelled', 'entered-in-error')
        or m.stop_date is null
        or m.stop_date >= current_date
      )
),
active_allergies as (
    select distinct
        lower(coalesce(a.description, a.code)) as allergy_name,
        coalesce(a.description, a.code) as allergy_display
    from allergies a
    join patients p on p.id = a.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and coalesce(a.clinical_status, 'active') = 'active'
),
med_pairs as (
    select
        least(m1.display_name, m2.display_name) as med_left,
        greatest(m1.display_name, m2.display_name) as med_right,
        m1.med_name as left_norm,
        m2.med_name as right_norm
    from active_meds m1
    join active_meds m2 on m1.display_name < m2.display_name
)
select * from (
    select
        'High' as "Severity",
        'Penicillin allergy conflict' as "Alert",
        string_agg(distinct a.allergy_display || ' + ' || m.display_name, '; ' order by a.allergy_display || ' + ' || m.display_name) as "Evidence",
        'Avoid penicillin-class therapy and verify alternatives before ordering.' as "Suggested Action"
    from active_allergies a
    join active_meds m on true
    where a.allergy_name ~* 'penicillin'
      and m.med_name ~* '(penicillin|amoxicillin|ampicillin|dicloxacillin|clavulanate)'
    having count(*) > 0

    union all

    select
        'High',
        'Major bleeding risk',
        string_agg(distinct med_left || ' + ' || med_right, '; ' order by med_left || ' + ' || med_right),
        'Review anticoagulant, antiplatelet, and NSAID combination before continuing therapy.'
    from med_pairs
    where (left_norm ~* '\mwarfarin\M' and right_norm ~* '(aspirin|clopidogrel|ibuprofen|naproxen)')
       or (right_norm ~* '\mwarfarin\M' and left_norm ~* '(aspirin|clopidogrel|ibuprofen|naproxen)')
    having count(*) > 0

    union all

    select
        'High',
        'Opioid combination review',
        string_agg(distinct med_left || ' + ' || med_right, '; ' order by med_left || ' + ' || med_right),
        'Multiple opioid therapies are active; verify intent and overdose risk.'
    from med_pairs
    where left_norm ~* '(fentanyl|tramadol|hydrocodone|oxycodone|codeine|morphine)'
      and right_norm ~* '(fentanyl|tramadol|hydrocodone|oxycodone|codeine|morphine)'
    having count(*) > 0

    union all

    select
        'Medium',
        'Duplicate statin therapy',
        string_agg(distinct med_left || ' + ' || med_right, '; ' order by med_left || ' + ' || med_right),
        'Confirm only one statin regimen should remain active.'
    from med_pairs
    where left_norm ~* '(simvastatin|atorvastatin|rosuvastatin|pravastatin|lovastatin)'
      and right_norm ~* '(simvastatin|atorvastatin|rosuvastatin|pravastatin|lovastatin)'
    having count(*) > 0

    union all

    select
        'Medium',
        'Duplicate rescue inhaler review',
        string_agg(distinct med_left || ' + ' || med_right, '; ' order by med_left || ' + ' || med_right),
        'Multiple albuterol products are active; verify patient instructions and duplication.'
    from med_pairs
    where left_norm ~* '(albuterol|ventolin|proair|proventil)'
      and right_norm ~* '(albuterol|ventolin|proair|proventil)'
    having count(*) > 0
) alerts) select count(*) from alerts;

with data as (
with med_base as (
    select
        nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '') as medication,
        coalesce(nullif(trim(m.dose_details), ''), 'Dose not specified') as dose_details,
        coalesce(nullif(trim(m.frequency), ''), 'Frequency not specified') as frequency,
        coalesce(initcap(nullif(trim(m.route), '')), 'Route not stated') as route,
        coalesce(nullif(trim(m.prescriber), ''), 'Prescriber not listed') as prescriber,
        coalesce(m.as_needed, false) as as_needed,
        m.start_date,
        m.stop_date,
        count(*) over (partition by nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '')) as regimen_count
    from medications m
    join patients p on p.id = m.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '') is not null
      and (
        coalesce(m.status, 'active') not in ('stopped', 'cancelled', 'entered-in-error')
        or m.stop_date is null
        or m.stop_date >= current_date
      )
),
review_rows as (
    select distinct
        case
            when regimen_count > 1 then 'Review duplicate therapy'
            when frequency = 'Frequency not specified' and dose_details = 'Dose not specified' then 'Clarify instructions'
            when frequency = 'Frequency not specified' then 'Add frequency'
            when prescriber = 'Prescriber not listed' then 'Confirm prescriber'
            when as_needed then 'Confirm PRN indication'
            when start_date is not null and start_date < current_date - interval '8 years' then 'Confirm still active'
            else 'Continue'
        end as "Review",
        medication as "Medication",
        trim(concat_ws(' | ', dose_details, frequency, route, case when as_needed then 'PRN' end)) as "Sig",
        prescriber as "Prescriber",
        start_date::date as "Started",
        stop_date::date as "Stops",
        case
            when regimen_count > 1 then 'Multiple active rows exist for the same medication.'
            when frequency = 'Frequency not specified' and dose_details = 'Dose not specified' then 'Dose and timing are both missing.'
            when frequency = 'Frequency not specified' then 'Timing is missing from the active medication record.'
            when prescriber = 'Prescriber not listed' then 'Ordering provider is missing.'
            when as_needed then 'Verify PRN indication and patient instructions.'
            when start_date is not null and start_date < current_date - interval '8 years' then 'Long-running therapy should be confirmed during reconciliation.'
            else 'No immediate medication issue detected.'
        end as "Why",
        case
            when regimen_count > 1 then 0
            when frequency = 'Frequency not specified' and dose_details = 'Dose not specified' then 1
            when frequency = 'Frequency not specified' then 2
            when prescriber = 'Prescriber not listed' then 3
            when as_needed then 4
            when start_date is not null and start_date < current_date - interval '8 years' then 5
            else 6
        end as sort_rank
    from med_base
)
select "Review", "Medication", "Sig", "Prescriber", "Started", "Stops", "Why"
from review_rows
order by sort_rank, "Started" desc nulls last, "Medication"
limit 40
)
select * from data
union all
select 'None', 'No active medications recorded', NULL, NULL, NULL::date, NULL::date, NULL
where not exists (select 1 from data);

with data as (with active_meds as (
    select distinct
        lower(nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '')) as med_name,
        nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '') as display_name
    from medications m
    join patients p on p.id = m.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '') is not null
      and (
        coalesce(m.status, 'active') not in ('stopped', 'cancelled', 'entered-in-error')
        or m.stop_date is null
        or m.stop_date >= current_date
      )
),
active_allergies as (
    select distinct
        lower(coalesce(a.description, a.code)) as allergy_name,
        coalesce(a.description, a.code) as allergy_display
    from allergies a
    join patients p on p.id = a.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and coalesce(a.clinical_status, 'active') = 'active'
),
med_pairs as (
    select
        least(m1.display_name, m2.display_name) as med_left,
        greatest(m1.display_name, m2.display_name) as med_right,
        m1.med_name as left_norm,
        m2.med_name as right_norm
    from active_meds m1
    join active_meds m2 on m1.display_name < m2.display_name
)
select * from (
    select
        'High' as "Severity",
        'Penicillin allergy conflict' as "Alert",
        string_agg(distinct a.allergy_display || ' + ' || m.display_name, '; ' order by a.allergy_display || ' + ' || m.display_name) as "Evidence",
        'Avoid penicillin-class therapy and verify alternatives before ordering.' as "Suggested Action"
    from active_allergies a
    join active_meds m on true
    where a.allergy_name ~* 'penicillin'
      and m.med_name ~* '(penicillin|amoxicillin|ampicillin|dicloxacillin|clavulanate)'
    having count(*) > 0

    union all

    select
        'High',
        'Major bleeding risk',
        string_agg(distinct med_left || ' + ' || med_right, '; ' order by med_left || ' + ' || med_right),
        'Review anticoagulant, antiplatelet, and NSAID combination before continuing therapy.'
    from med_pairs
    where (left_norm ~* '\mwarfarin\M' and right_norm ~* '(aspirin|clopidogrel|ibuprofen|naproxen)')
       or (right_norm ~* '\mwarfarin\M' and left_norm ~* '(aspirin|clopidogrel|ibuprofen|naproxen)')
    having count(*) > 0

    union all

    select
        'High',
        'Opioid combination review',
        string_agg(distinct med_left || ' + ' || med_right, '; ' order by med_left || ' + ' || med_right),
        'Multiple opioid therapies are active; verify intent and overdose risk.'
    from med_pairs
    where left_norm ~* '(fentanyl|tramadol|hydrocodone|oxycodone|codeine|morphine)'
      and right_norm ~* '(fentanyl|tramadol|hydrocodone|oxycodone|codeine|morphine)'
    having count(*) > 0

    union all

    select
        'Medium',
        'Duplicate statin therapy',
        string_agg(distinct med_left || ' + ' || med_right, '; ' order by med_left || ' + ' || med_right),
        'Confirm only one statin regimen should remain active.'
    from med_pairs
    where left_norm ~* '(simvastatin|atorvastatin|rosuvastatin|pravastatin|lovastatin)'
      and right_norm ~* '(simvastatin|atorvastatin|rosuvastatin|pravastatin|lovastatin)'
    having count(*) > 0

    union all

    select
        'Medium',
        'Duplicate rescue inhaler review',
        string_agg(distinct med_left || ' + ' || med_right, '; ' order by med_left || ' + ' || med_right),
        'Multiple albuterol products are active; verify patient instructions and duplication.'
    from med_pairs
    where left_norm ~* '(albuterol|ventolin|proair|proventil)'
      and right_norm ~* '(albuterol|ventolin|proair|proventil)'
    having count(*) > 0
) alerts) select * from data union all select 'Low', 'No active medication safety alerts', NULL, NULL where not exists (select 1 from data);

with data as (
select recorded_date::date as "Recorded", allergy as "Allergy", reaction as "Reaction", reaction_severity as "Reaction Severity", criticality as "Criticality", safety_note as "Safety Note"
from provider_allergy_details
where golden_id = '${golden_id}'
order by case reaction_severity when 'Severe' then 0 when 'Moderate' then 1 when 'Mild' then 2 else 3 end, recorded_date desc nulls last, allergy
limit 25
)
select * from data
union all
select NULL::date, 'No active allergies recorded', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL
where not exists (select 1 from data);

with data as (
select distinct
    initcap(coalesce(cp.category, 'care plan')) as "Category",
    left(cp.description, 90) as "Plan",
    initcap(coalesce(cp.status, 'active')) as "Status",
    cp.start_date::date as "Started",
    left(coalesce(cp.activity_summary, ''), 120) as "Next Step"
from care_plans cp
join patients p on p.id = cp.patient_id
where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
  and coalesce(cp.status, 'active') in ('active', 'draft', 'on-hold')
order by "Started" desc nulls last, "Plan"
limit 25
)
select * from data
union all
select 'Care plan', 'No active care plans recorded', NULL, NULL::date, NULL
where not exists (select 1 from data);

list.description: Paste a golden_id from the provider search or patient directory.
list.label: Golden ID
list.name: golden_id
